source: User-provided TTB Label Verification App golden test set, normalized into repo slices.

core-six.description: Default demo, seeded UI, and live single-label regression baseline.

latency-twenty.description: Checked-in synthetic 20-case live image-backed latency slice spanning the core six plus representative beverage, format, dependency, and warning cases.

beverage-type-coverage.description: Beverage-specific rule coverage beyond the core six.

format-compliance.description: Format-rule coverage for ABV, net contents, and proof formatting.

deterministic-comparison.description: No-image comparison edge cases for string and numeric normalization.

cross-field-dependencies.description: Rule interactions that depend on multiple extracted or submitted fields.

standalone-mode.description: Image-only review mode without application data.

batch-processing.description: Batch ingest, matching, drill-in, and export behavior.

error-handling.description: Upload, unreadable image, and wrong-product handling.

endpoint-review.description: Route-aware integrated review coverage for the current model-backed /api/review surface.

endpoint-batch.description: Route-aware batch run and retry coverage for the model-backed batch path.

cola-cloud-real.description: Real TTB-approved label images fetched from COLA Cloud API. Covers distilled spirits, wine, and malt beverages.

supplemental-negative.description: Deterministic negative and low-confidence fixtures derived from real COLA Cloud labels.

cases.title: Perfect Spirit Label
cases.notes: Happy-path approval baseline with no false alarms.

cases.title: Spirit Label With Warning Errors
cases.notes: Showcase warning defect with title-case heading and missing comma.

cases.title: Spirit Label With Brand Name Case Mismatch
cases.notes: Dave judgement test: cosmetic case difference must downgrade to review.

cases.title: Wine Label Missing Appellation
cases.notes: Cross-field dependency case: vintage claim requires appellation.

cases.title: Beer Label With Forbidden ABV Format
cases.notes: Format-rule case: numeric value matches, label expression does not.

cases.title: Low Quality Image
cases.expectedSummary: Confidence-driven review with image-quality warning banner
cases.notes: System should degrade gracefully instead of crashing or over-approving.

cases.title: Perfect Beer Label
cases.notes: Beer-specific baseline where ABV may be omitted.

cases.title: Beer With Geographic Style Unqualified
cases.notes: Domestic beer uses foreign geographic style name without 'style' qualifier.

cases.title: Wine With Multiple Varietals Valid
cases.notes: Compliant multi-varietal wine baseline.

cases.title: Wine With Multiple Varietals Invalid Total
cases.notes: Varietal percentages total 90 instead of 100.

cases.title: Wine Label Table Wine Exemption
cases.notes: Table wine designation stands in for explicit ABV.

cases.title: Spirits With ABV Abbreviation
cases.notes: Same forbidden abbreviation rule applied to spirits.

cases.title: Spirits Net Contents In U.S. Measures
cases.notes: Spirits must use metric standards of fill.

cases.title: Beer Net Contents In Metric Primary
cases.notes: Metric primary statement should downgrade to review.

cases.title: Spirits Proof Not In Parentheses
cases.notes: Proof should be distinguished from the required percentage statement.

cases.title: Brand Name Minor Whitespace Difference
cases.notes: Extra whitespace should not hard-fail a likely match.

cases.title: Brand Name With Special Characters
cases.notes: Covers exact special-char match and cosmetic case/apostrophe handling.

cases.title: ABV Numeric Match With Format Difference
cases.notes: 45, 45%, and 45.0% should normalize as the same value.

cases.title: ABV Outside Tolerance
cases.notes: Difference of 1.0 exceeds the +/-0.3 tolerance.

cases.title: ABV Within Tolerance
cases.notes: Difference of 0.2 remains within tolerance.

cases.title: Class Type Case Insensitive
cases.notes: Class/type designations should ignore case-only differences.

cases.title: Name And Address Abbreviation Difference
cases.notes: Company/Co. and Kentucky/KY should produce review, not fail.

cases.title: Imported Spirit Without Country Of Origin
cases.notes: Imported product must carry a country-of-origin statement.

cases.title: Whisky Under 4 Years Without Age Statement
cases.notes: Absence of age statement is ambiguous without knowing the actual age.

cases.title: Wine With Varietal But No Appellation
cases.notes: Varietal designation requires appellation on the brand label.

cases.title: Wine With Vintage And Appellation
cases.notes: Compliant counterpart to the missing-appellation dependency case.

cases.title: Government Warning Completely Missing
cases.notes: Missing warning should be a direct blocker.

cases.title: Warning With Correct Text But All In Bold
cases.notes: Only the prefix may be bold.

cases.title: Warning With Surgeon General Lowercase
cases.notes: Lowercase 'surgeon general' should fail the capitalization sub-check.

cases.title: Warning With Extra Text Inserted
cases.notes: Extra text before the mandated statement must fail.

cases.title: Warning Split Across Two Label Panels
cases.notes: Split warning should fail the continuous-paragraph check.

cases.title: Image Only No Application Data
cases.notes: Standalone mode should still show useful extracted checks.

cases.title: Standalone With Format Errors
cases.notes: Standalone mode must still catch absolute format violations.

cases.title: The Mixed Batch
cases.notes: Mixed batch composed of the core six.

cases.title: Batch With No CSV
cases.notes: All uploaded labels should be processed in standalone mode.

cases.title: Batch With Mismatched Counts
cases.notes: Unmatched images should fall back to standalone mode with an explicit warning.

cases.title: Non Image File Upload
cases.notes: Reject docx/txt/xlsx with a structured validation error.

cases.title: Oversized Image
cases.notes: Reject files larger than 10 MB.

cases.title: Completely Unreadable Image
cases.notes: No readable text should produce a recoverable unreadable-image error.

cases.title: Image Of A Non Alcohol Product
cases.notes: Wrong-product uploads must fail cleanly rather than crash or hallucinate success.

cases.title: Lake Placid — Shredder — ABV Overlay
cases.notes: Derived from lake-placid-shredder-malt-beverage. Injects a false 5% ABV overlay into a real approved label.

cases.title: Simply Elegant — Simply Elegant Spirits — Warning Occluded
cases.notes: Derived from simply-elegant-simply-elegant-spirits-distilled-spirits. Covers the lower warning region with a light sticker block.

cases.title: Leitz — Rottland — Warning Crop
cases.notes: Derived from leitz-rottland-wine. Trims the lower section and pads with blank space to remove label evidence.

cases.title: Lake Placid — Ridge Runner — Warning Occluded
cases.notes: Derived from lake-placid-ridge-runner-malt-beverage. Blocks the lower third of the label with an opaque shape.

cases.title: Persian Empire — Black Widow — Global Blur
cases.notes: Derived from persian-empire-black-widow-distilled-spirits. Applies heavy global blur to simulate unreadable label capture.

cases.title: Uncorked In Mayberry — Otis' Own — Low Contrast
cases.notes: Derived from uncorked-in-mayberry-otis-own-wine. Reduces saturation and contrast to create a borderline legibility case.

cases.title: Recluse Brew Works — Shy Guy — Overprint Sticker
cases.notes: Derived from recluse-brew-works-shy-guy-malt-beverage. Adds a synthetic sticker over label text to mimic an illegitimate post-approval edit.
